summary: Created src/utils/dateUtils.ts with toDisplayDate (YYYY-MM-DD → DD-MM-YYYY), toStorageDate (DD-MM-YYYY → YYYY-MM-DD), and isValidDisplayDate helpers. Applied conversion throughout all user-facing screens. Firestore storage stays YYYY-MM-DD for sort order.

Rewrote CreateClassScreen to support recurring class creation and editing. Added: recurring toggle (Switch), dayOfWeek chip picker, activeFrom/activeUntil inputs, scope banners. Implemented 5-branch submit logic: edit series, edit occurrence only, create recurring, edit standalone, create standalone.

Updated ClassDetailScreen to show edit scope dialog for recurring classes. Default action is 'Edit This Occurrence Only' (safe). 'Edit All Future Occurrences' requires a second destructive confirmation alert. handleRegister updated to pass virtualClass for virtual ID resolution.
Updated WeeklyScheduleScreen handleClassPress to pass classData for virtual occurrences so ClassDetailScreen can resolve them without a Firestore lookup.

Fixed two bugs in CreateClassScreen: (1) notes field passed as undefined when empty — Firebase rejects undefined values; fixed with conditional spread `...(notes.trim() ? { notes: notes.trim() } : {})`. (2) Success flow used Alert.alert requiring manual OK tap to navigate back; replaced all success Alerts with toast.success() + immediate navigation.goBack().

Fixed delete flow in ClassDetailScreen. Problems: (1) deleteClass(classId) on a virtual recurring ID was a Firestore no-op since the doc doesn't exist; (2) no success feedback after delete. Fix: split handleDelete into scope-aware branches — recurring classes show 'Cancel This Occurrence' (materialize + isCancelled=true) or 'Delete Entire Series' (deleteRecurringClass); standalone shows simple confirm then deleteClass. All success paths call toast.success(). Added loading={actionLoading} to Delete button. Added imports: deleteRecurringClass, updateClass, materializeOccurrence, toast.

Rewrote WeeklyScheduleScreen to show all 7 days as a grouped list instead of day-by-day. Used SectionList with stickySectionHeadersEnabled. Each section header shows day name, date, class count badge, and a gold dot + gold text for today. Empty days show 'No classes scheduled' + inline 'Add class' link for trainers. Auto-scrolls to today's section on load. Removed selectedDay state and horizontal day strip entirely.

Added isHeadTrainer const (user.role === head_trainer) in ClassDetailScreen. Wrapped Delete button in {isHeadTrainer && ...} so regular trainers see only View Participants + Edit. Head trainers see all three. Delete logic (recurring prompt vs standalone confirm) unchanged.

Built ConfirmModal component (src/components/ConfirmModal.tsx). Accepts visible, title, message, buttons[], onDismiss. Buttons support default/cancel/destructive styles, scrollable for long lists. Replaced all Alert.alert calls: ClassDetailScreen (6 flows → modal state object), ProfileScreen (sign-out), UserManagementScreen (role + belt selection). All simple error/success alerts replaced with toast.error()/toast.success(). Alert import fully removed from all screens.

Fixed 4 Athena findings: (1) useAuth.ts replaced console.error with toast.error for auth failure. (2) WeeklyScheduleScreen FAB shadow replaced with shadows.lg from theme. (3) Added spacing.xxs:2 to theme. (4) Replaced all hardcoded 3-4px spacing values across ClassCard, WeeklyScheduleScreen, Badge, MainNavigator, LoginScreen with theme tokens.

description: Ported ConfirmModal, Toast/ToastContainer, Button, Input from TapIn. Built RatingBadge (TechniqueValueBadge + DrillGradeBadge) unique to YOLOplata. All adapted to theme object. ToastContainer wired into App.tsx.
Built LoginScreen and RegisterScreen. Gold primary on dark background. No Alert.alert — all errors via toast. authService built alongside (registerUser, loginUser, logoutUser).
